ddls:
CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor used in the system */,
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar array used in the system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the system */,
  "installation_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who installed the system */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the system */,
  "maintenance_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if maintenance is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motors ("motor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_solar_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("solar_array_id") REFERENCES solar_arrays ("solar_array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_installation_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motors" (
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor */,
  "motor_type" TEXT /* Type of the motor */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage rating of the motor */,
  "amps" REAL /* Amps rating of the motor */,
  "watts" REAL /* Watts rating of the motor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the motor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the motor */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the motor was produced */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the motor's warranty */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Recommended maintenance schedule for the motor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_arrays" (
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar array */,
  "array_type" TEXT /* Type of the solar array */,
  "watts" REAL /* Watts rating of the solar array */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the solar array */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the solar array */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the solar array */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the solar array was produced */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the solar array's warranty */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Recommended maintenance schedule for the solar array */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system */,
  "psi" REAL /* PSI (pounds per square inch) measurement */,
  "tdh_feet" REAL /* TDH (total dynamic head) in feet */,
  "tdh_meters" REAL /* TDH in meters */,
  "motor_voltage" REAL /* Motor voltage measurement */,
  "motor_amps" REAL /* Motor amps measurement */,
  "lpm" REAL /* LPM (liters per minute) measurement */,
  "motor_watts" REAL /* Motor watts measurement */,
  "solar_array_watts" REAL /* Solar array watts measurement */,
  "system_efficiency" REAL /* System efficiency measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the performance measurement */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the measurement */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who recorded the performance data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance measurement */,
  "predicted_energy_yield" REAL /* Predicted energy yield based on the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system */,
  "motor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motor used in the configuration */,
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar array used in the configuration */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was used */,
  "configuration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who configured the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_motor_id FOREIGN KEY ("motor_id") REFERENCES motors ("motor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_solar_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("solar_array_id") REFERENCES solar_arrays ("solar_array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
